description_long: This keyboard features a compact, rectangular design with a wooden-textured top plate and teal-colored keycaps. The keys are arranged in a standard staggered layout, with a large, rounded teal knob or dial located in the upper left corner, possibly for volume or other control functions. The keycaps are semi-translucent, allowing for a subtle glow or backlighting effect. The frame is slim and dark, contrasting with the warm wood grain and cool teal keys. The keyboard appears to be tenkeyless, omitting the numeric keypad for a more streamlined profile. The overall build suggests a modern, stylish accessory suitable for both office and home environments.
description: A compact, tenkeyless keyboard with a wood-textured top plate and teal semi-translucent keycaps, featuring a prominent teal control knob in the upper left corner.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard, highlighting the teal keycaps and the large teal knob on the left.
description_view_1: Left-side view emphasizing the depth of the keyboard and the prominent teal knob at the near corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back row of keys and the wood-textured surface, with the knob now on the right.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the keyboard's slim profile and the teal knob at the far end.
